# PetSwap

> PetSwap is the UK pet owner community for trusted dog sitter swaps and mutual pet care — a free pet sitting alternative connecting verified local pet owners.

PetSwap helps UK pet owners arrange mutual care swaps with nearby, verified members. Members exchange trusted help with dog walking, sitting and overnight care without money changing hands.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What PetSwap is, how it works, trust signals, cities and pricing.
- [Welcome](/welcome): Get started and join the PetSwap community.
- [Support](/support): Help centre, FAQs and contact form for account, safety and billing.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How PetSwap collects, uses and protects member data.
- [Terms of Use](/terms): The agreement between members and PetSwap.
